tool_args.label: Belmont Stakes Day Service - June 11, 2022
tool_args.raw_text: Belmont service is resuming for spring racing season. There will be two trains in and two trains out every Saturday from April 30 through July 9, for a total of 14 race days. This is on top of the expanded Belmont Stakes Day service on June 11.

payload.description: Belmont Stakes Day - LIRR will run extra trains. Hempstead Branch service reduced to two-hourly for staging of Belmont trains.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Belmont service is resuming for spring racing season.
Belmont Stakes Race – Belmont Park, June 11, 2022

tool_args.label: LIRR 188th Birthday
tool_args.raw_text: yesterday, LIRR celebrated a milestone with its 188th birthday. LIRR was chartered in 1834, which makes it the oldest railroad in the United States still operating under its same name.

payload.date_text: May 2022 (the day before the May 23, 2022 meeting)
payload.description: LIRR celebrated its 188th birthday; chartered in 1834

date_text_normalized.raw_text: May 2022 (the day before the May 23, 2022 meeting)

evidence_refs.source_quote: yesterday, LIRR celebrated a milestone with its 188th birthday.

tool_args.label: Nanuet Station Rebuilt Platform Shelter Opening
tool_args.raw_text: This past Thursday, Metro-North opened the rebuilt platform shelter at the Nanuet station in Rockland County.

payload.description: Metro-North opened rebuilt platform shelter at Nanuet station dedicated to Orrin Goetz

tool_args.label: Westbury Transit-Oriented Development
tool_args.raw_text: Mill Creek Residential has been selected to design and construct a mixed-use TOD at LIRR's Westbury station. Mill Creek will design and construct a new residential community of at least 200 homes and will create a new public open space

payload.description: Mill Creek Residential selected to design and construct mixed-use TOD at LIRR Westbury station; at least 200 homes and new public open space

evidence_refs.source_quote: Mill Creek Residential has been selected to design and construct a mixed-use TOD at LIRR's Westbury station.

tool_args.label: Queens Interlocking Project
tool_args.raw_text: LIRR Engineering will be piggybacking these weekends, removing a switch in Queens Interlocking as part of the Queens Interlocking Project.

payload.description: Removing a switch in Queens Interlocking as part of LIRR Engineering work; supports Main Line expansion

evidence_refs.source_quote: removing a switch in Queens Interlocking as part of the Queens Interlocking Project

tool_args.label: Main Line Expansion Project
tool_args.raw_text: realignment of rail in Divide Interlocking near Hicksville for Main Line expansion

evidence_refs.source_quote: realignment of rail in Divide Interlocking near Hicksville for Main Line expansion

tool_args.label: Metro-North M8 PTC Software Upgrade Contract
tool_args.raw_text: a ratification of a 17 month federally funded miscellaneous service contract to Alstom Signaling, Inc. in the estimated amount of $15,155,850. The contract is for PTC software upgrades, technical support, and field qualification services to enhance the ATC and ACSES installed on Metro-North's M8 fleet.

payload.description: Contract to Alstom Signaling, Inc. for $15,155,850 for PTC software upgrades, technical support, and field qualification services for Metro-North M8 fleet

evidence_refs.source_quote: a ratification of a 17 month federally funded miscellaneous service contract to Alstom Signaling, Inc. in the estimated amount of $15,155,850

tool_args.label: Metro-North FRA Customer Injury Rate Feb 2022
tool_args.raw_text: The FRA reportable customer injury rate for the 12 months ending February 2022 was 1.75 per one million customers, which was down from 2.04 for the prior 12 month period.

tool_args.raw_text: Its reportable customer injury rate was down from 4.69 to 2.74 per million customers.

tool_args.label: Metro-North 2021 Ridership Increase from 2020

tool_args.label: Metro-North M8 Fleet MDBF March 2022

tool_args.label: LIRR M9 Cars Overperforming Expectations
tool_args.raw_text: President Rinaldi is happy to say that the cars LIRR has accepted thus far have been overperforming past expectations, which is a very good thing for its customers. It is important to note that no safety issues have been identified and LIRR expects all cars to be delivered by the end of the year.

payload.claim_text: The cars LIRR has accepted thus far have been overperforming past expectations. No safety issues have been identified and LIRR expects all cars to be delivered by the end of the year.
payload.subject: LIRR M9 railcars

evidence_refs.source_quote: the cars LIRR has accepted thus far have been overperforming past expectations
